name: One Nevada Credit Union
description_short: Nevada-based credit union offering checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with competitive rates and digital banking services.
description_long:
One Nevada Credit Union is a federally insured credit union (NCUA) operating in Nevada with a stated mission to build financially savvy members and strengthen the state's economy. The organization positions itself as an alternative to national banks, emphasizing lower rates and personalized service.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, mortgages (30-year fixed at 6.285% APR and 15-year at 5.807% APR), auto loans (new and used at 5.49% APR), personal lines of credit, VISA Platinum credit cards (11.75% APR), and digital banking services. Members can apply online or in-person, with options for loan pre-qualification without affecting credit scores. The institution also provides insurance comparison tools for auto and home coverage tracking and management.

One Nevada differentiates itself through emphasis on member benefits, community involvement including scholarships and event sponsorship, and flexible lending terms. The routing number 322484401 is publicly listed, and the organization highlights employee culture and benefits as part of recruitment messaging. The website emphasizes financial education and building savings habits alongside lending services.

As a credit union, One Nevada requires membership eligibility (criteria not detailed on homepage). While rates are advertised "as low as," actual rates depend on individual credit standing, collateral, and loan terms. The "No Payments for 90 Days" promotion applies only to direct financing with the credit union, not dealer financing. Like all financial institutions, membership and eligibility requirements may apply.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Federally insured by NCUA, providing deposit protection
Advertises rates lower than national banks (6.285% 30-year mortgage, 5.49% auto loans)
Provides 90-day payment deferral program for qualified members
Free insurance comparison and management tools for auto and home coverage
Digital banking with mobile check deposit, spending limits, and account alerts
Community involvement with scholarships and local event sponsorships
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly defined on website; may limit access
Advertised rates are "as low as" — actual rates vary based on credit profile and collateral
No mention of mobile app availability, download links, or specific digital platform details
Limited transparency on joining process, fees, or account minimums on homepage
90-day payment deferral limited to direct credit union financing, not dealer-financed loans
best_for: Nevada residents seeking lower mortgage and auto loan rates than national banks
Credit union members wanting comprehensive financial management including insurance tools
Consumers needing payment flexibility via 90-day deferral programs
Community-focused savers and borrowers supporting local Nevada initiatives
diagnosis: One Nevada Credit Union is best for Nevada residents eligible for membership who want competitive rates on mortgages and auto loans combined with comprehensive digital banking and community-minded banking. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility requirements are not disclosed on the website, and all advertised rates are conditional on credit profile and collateral — actual rates may be significantly higher than the advertised minimums.
services: Savings accounts with compounded monthly dividends
30-year fixed-rate mortgages (6.285% APR as low as)
15-year fixed-rate mortgages (5.807% APR as low as)
Auto loans for new and used vehicles (5.49% APR as low as)
VISA Platinum credit cards (11.75% APR as low as)
Digital banking with mobile check deposit
Loan pre-qualification without hard credit inquiry
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 9320 W Flamingo Rd #1, Las Vegas, NV 89147
